evidence_excerpts: Concrete Stage: Organizing market items into sets and subsets using stones and sticks. The learner forms subsets and represents information using concrete objects from the local environment. Use stones to represent customers.; Group local items into Sets.; Identify subsets within the market.

evidence_excerpts: Pictorial Stage: Drawing Venn diagrams for market sets and creating price sequences. The learner represents information on Venn diagrams and identifies number patterns in a sequence. Draw a Venn diagram of the inventory.; Create a price sequence for items.; Identify the rule of the sequence.
